title: Stoneforge
description: Adds decorative variants for various stone blocks
body:
This mod adds missing building block variations for diorite, andesite, granite, dripstone, calcite, soul sand, as well as flint block and its variations. Prismarine, purpur, obsidian and Nether brick variations may be added in the future.

When playing with Supplementaries, use this data pack
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/stoneforge-supplementaries-compat

Credits and thanks:
ImXR24 - most block textures. 
Paulevs - textures for obsidian and Nether brick variations.
